title: QOL
description: This Modpack adds many Quality Of Life improvements for everyday Vanilla Minecraft use!
body:
This Mod pack adds many Quality Of Life improvements! 

- Fully client side and can be used in most servers, including Hypixel! 
- It contains many performance mods and different useful mods for everyday Minecraft use!
- Improvements to performance and various QOL improvements to improve your vanilla Minecraft experience!
